name: Regions Bank (Drive-Thru Only)
description_short: Regions Bank's Orange Bowl Remote Drive-Thru Branch in Miami offers limited banking services through drive-thru access only, with no in-person lobby services available.
description_long:
Regions Bank is a for-profit, FDIC-insured bank operating the Orange Bowl Remote Drive-Thru Branch located at 2750 Northwest 7th Street in Miami, Florida. This location is part of Regions Bank's broader banking operations, which provide consumer and business financial products across multiple channels. The Orange Bowl Remote Drive-Thru Branch is specifically designed as a drive-thru only facility, meaning customers cannot enter a physical lobby or speak with staff face-to-face at this location.

The drive-thru branch offers core deposit and cash transaction services including deposits, cash withdrawals, transfers between accounts, and check cashing for Regions deposit account customers and Regions Now Banking customers. The location features one Drive-up DepositSmart ATM and provides access to Western Union services for domestic and international money transfers. Operating hours are Monday through Friday 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., and Saturday 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m., with the location closed on Sundays. Customers can reach the branch by phone at 786-860-6600.

This drive-thru only format distinguishes it from traditional full-service banking branches. Regions Bank emphasizes technology-driven convenience through online and mobile banking services, positioning this drive-thru location as part of a broader omnichannel banking strategy. The company highlights commitments to community partnership, lending programs, nonprofit support, and educational initiatives as part of its corporate identity.

The primary limitation of this location is its drive-thru-only operational model, which restricts access to basic transaction services without the ability to meet with banking professionals, open new accounts in person, or access full branch amenities. For customers needing comprehensive banking services, account opening, loan consultation, or in-person financial guidance, this location alone would be insufficient. The restricted service model and limited hours (closed Sundays, early Friday closing) may not accommodate all customer schedules or banking needs.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 5:00 p.m. Monday-Friday
Saturday morning access (9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m.)
ATM access with Drive-up DepositSmart technology available
Check cashing available for Regions account holders
Western Union service for domestic and international money transfers
cons: Drive-thru only format—no in-person lobby or staff consultation available
Limited transaction services compared to full-service branches
Closed Sundays and no evening hours beyond 5:00 p.m.
Check cashing restricted to existing Regions account holders
No ability to open accounts or access comprehensive banking products at this location
best_for: Regions Bank customers who need convenient drive-thru access for deposits and cash withdrawals
Miami-area residents with existing Regions accounts seeking after-hours transaction alternatives
Customers requiring quick check cashing or Western Union services without entering a branch
diagnosis: This location is best for existing Regions Bank customers in Miami who need convenient drive-thru access for basic transactions during standard business hours. The primary caveat is that this is a drive-thru only facility with no in-person banking services, loan consultation, or account opening capabilities—customers requiring comprehensive banking services must visit a full-service Regions branch.
services: Check cashing for Regions deposit account customers
Check cashing for Regions Now Banking customers
International money transfer via Western Union

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 2750 NW 7th St, Miami, FL 33125, USA
